title: Rebrand exploration
description: A logo system I designed for a fictional outdoor gear brand, just to see where it went.
image_alt: A set of logo variations for a fictional outdoor gear brand called Summit, using earthy tones and clean geometric shapes.

title: Type specimen poster
description: Playing with editorial layout and variable fonts at 2am.
image_alt: A type specimen poster showcasing a variable serif font, with large display text and layered color blocks.

title: Dashboard UI concept
description: A density experiment — how much data can you surface without creating chaos?
image_alt: A UI concept for a data dashboard showing activity metrics, with a dark background and warm accent colors.

title: RunRelief
description: An iOS app solving the most urgent problem in running — finding a bathroom before it's too late.
image_alt: RunRelief iOS app interface showing a map with nearby bathroom locations for runners.
